personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | AWS Data Platform & AI/ML Pipeline Specialist

summary: AWS Data Engineer specializing in ML-enabled pipelines and scalable data platforms. With 20+ years of experience, the candidate excels in building ETL pipelines with AWS (S3, Glue, Redshift), Python, and PySpark, while leveraging ML forecasting tools like Prophet and scikit-learn for advanced analytics.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected automated ETL pipelines using Python/Pandas to ingest telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, enhancing data processing efficiency.
Built hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform with S3 for raw data, Glue for ETL, and Redshift for ML forecasting workloads at scale.
Developed ML forecasting models with Prophet and scikit-learn, achieving 90%+ accuracy in predicting capacity bottlenecks 6 months ahead.
Migrated heavy ML workloads from on-prem Oracle to Redshift, enabling parallel forecasting and improved provisioning lead times.
Designed optimized schemas for data warehousing, supporting seasonal risk forecasting and executive reporting dashboards.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace monitoring for critical hospitality systems, ensuring robust data collection for performance optimization.
Led data mining initiatives to surface performance metrics, driving actionable recommendations for engineering teams.
Participated in AWS cloud migration planning, providing readiness assessments for data and monitoring tools.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Managed large-scale CA APM environments, supporting data collection across 4,000–6,000 agents for enterprise analytics.
Developed automated data extraction scripts in Perl/Ksh, streamlining performance reporting processes.
Collaborated with J2EE teams to resolve data bottlenecks, enhancing system throughput and reliability.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Cloud & Data: AWS (S3, Glue, Redshift, Athena), PySpark, Apache Spark, Hive/Hadoop, Data Warehousing, ETL Design
skills.Tools & Infra: Pandas, Airflow, Docker, Git, Streamlit, Linux/Unix, BMC TrueSight

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, and Bedrock, optimizing ETL processes for enterprise-scale data access and analytics.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Developed an AI-driven forecasting engine with Python and PySpark, reducing cycles by 90% using Prophet and scikit-learn for bottleneck prediction.
